Comparison of Deep-Research Agents: Intelligence, Coverage & Reliability

Independent benchmark of open-source deep-research agents across 56 cross-site research tasks. Each report is scored for URL grounding, judge pass-rate, and presentation, then converted to a Bradley-Terry Elo. See the methodology →

Intelligence Index v4 Multi-pillar NEW Backbones Audit Methodology

Coverage is how many of the 57 tasks each agent has a valid score for. Agents with fewer than 30 pairs are marked partial — Elo tightens as more pairs land. A "~" means the gap to the row above is not statistically significant.
95% CI · 1000-iter bootstrap · click row for drill-down
Adjacent-rank significance · permutation N=1000
camel-ai › flowsearcher-ds Δ79 p=0.305
flowsearcher-ds › smolagents Δ94 p=0.447
smolagents › ldr Δ362 p=0.0
ldr › gpt-researcher Δ79 p=0.326
gpt-researcher › deerflow Δ44 p=0.573
deerflow › ii-researcher Δ90 p=0.31
ii-researcher › langchain-odr Δ3 p=0.97
langchain-odr › storm Δ11 p=0.896

Score landscape

Elo on the X-axis across three different vertical dimensions. Top-right is better. Click any dot to jump to that agent in the table above.

Elo vs Confidence width

Narrower CI = more certainty. Lower is better.

Loading…

Frequently asked questions

Common questions about the leaderboard, the sandbox, and how scoring works.

What does composite_v2 measure exactly?
composite_v2 = reachability · qm_factor · nli_factor · (0.40·url_coverage + 0.40·checklist + 0.20·spec)

The first three are multiplicative gates — if reachability is zero (fabricated URLs), the whole score is zero, no matter how fluent the prose. The quality part inside parens is a weighted mix of three deterministic signals.

Why pairwise Elo instead of averaging the composite?

Composite scores are noisy and task-difficulty-correlated. If task #5 is hard, every agent scores low — averaging is misleading. Pairwise cancels out the per-task baseline (the same trick that makes chess Elo work).

How is the golden URL pool generated?

For each task, a scraper walks the three sandbox sites and collects 120-130 must-cite URLs. The pool is frozen — committed to data/golden/deep/. URL coverage is the agent's recall against this set.

What LLM judges the reports?

DeepSeek V4-flash with thinking disabled, served through a local proxy on localhost:8088. Same model, same temperature (0) for every report — judging is deterministic.

Can I reproduce this on my own machine?

Yes. docker compose up brings up the sandbox; six parallel workers complete a fresh 397-pair run in ~3 hours. See Reproduce for the full recipe.

How do I add a new DR framework?

Drop a runner at scripts/runners/<your_agent>_runner.py exposing async def run(intent, model, shim_url, proxy_url) -> str. The registry auto-discovers it. Full walkthrough on Reproduce.

DR Deep-Research Arena

Independent leaderboard for open-source deep-research agents. Same tasks, same scoring, public method.

composite_v2 = reachability · qm · nli · (0.4 url + 0.4 judge + 0.2 spec) · Sandbox: Magento + Postmill + Kiwix · Bradley-Terry Elo · bootstrap N=1000
